title: pyrrhopappus grandiflorus
intro: Pyrrhopappus grandiflorus, also known as the large-flowered tarweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Pyrrhopappus grandiflorus has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Herbal preparations of Pyrrhopappus grandiflorus, including infusions and tinctures, have been used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
